{{Quote|You're the best hunt saboteur I've come across, at least recently. And if you're the best there is right now. . . then I don't have to worry about you interfering with my business.|[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], to N'dru Suhlak|<ref name="Slave Ship">''[[Slave Ship]]''</ref>}}
'''N'dru Suhlak''' was a [[hunt saboteur]] during the [[Bounty Hunter Wars]] and former [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]]. Despite being an accomplished pilot having learned from both [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]] and [[Jek Tono Porkins/Legends|Jek Porkins]], Suhlak was removed from the [[Tierfon Rebel Outpost]] for excessive insubordination and found work elsewhere ferrying bounties.

Twice, he intervened in [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett's]] business, and he once teamed up with the fearsome [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]]. Fortunately for him, Suhlak was able to escape the partnership with his life after he pulled a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] on Fett, [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]], and [[Kateel of Kuhlvult|Neelah]].

[[File:SWX25-Heavy95.jpg|thumb|right|250px|N'dru Suhlak in his Z-95 Headhunter]]
Suhlak piloted a modified [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]] that had the space bubbled out to be able to fit more passengers in it. This was done because of his job; a hunt saboteur would be paid by people with bounties on their heads to take them to remote areas so that the bounty hunters looking for them wouldn't find them.
